goal: Implement all 4 OpenSpec proposals (core-renderer-01, physics-engine-02, visual-effects-03, audio-polish-04) through the full Proposal→Implementation→Architect pipeline
requirements: Each proposal goes through: Proposal job → Implementation job → Architect job
Proposal role: openspec explore → ask Architect if issues → openspec proposal
Implementation role: openspec-apply-change → openspec-verify-change → fix all findings → openspec-sync-specs → openspec-archive-change → commit and push
Architect role: investigate issues, architecture review, find solutions for open questions
Proposals have dependency chain: renderer → physics → effects → audio
acceptance_criteria: Architecture reviews completed for each proposal

Implementation.purpose: Apply, verify, and finalize OpenSpec changes

Architect.purpose: Architecture review, investigate issues, find solutions
